gear.name: Armoured Undersuit
gear.effect: This fighter can reroll an injury roll during the end phase.

gear.name: Auspex
gear.effect: Target an enemy within 12" they lose the benefit of Cover until the end of the round.

gear.name: Bionic Arm
gear.effect: Restore WS to original value. Gain +1 Weapon Skill to Melee attacks with this arm.

gear.name: Bionic Eye
gear.effect: Restore BS to original value. Fighter ignores negative modifiers from Cover.

gear.name: Bionic Leg
gear.effect: Restore Move to original value. Ignore the first 3" of vertical climbing distance.

gear.name: Camo Cloak
gear.effect: This fighter gains a Stealth token.

gear.name: Carapace Armour
gear.effect: This fighter gains +2 Defence.

gear.name: Combat Drugs
gear.effect: Once per battle, this fighter gains +1 Weapon Skill and +1 Attack to Melee weapons for the rest of their activation. At the end of their activation this fighter takes 1d6 damage.

gear.name: Dataslate
gear.effect: +1 dice when interacting with computer terminals or hacking.

gear.name: Flak Armour
gear.effect: This fighter gains +1 Defence.

gear.name: Scout Armour
gear.effect: This fighter gains +2 Defence.

gear.name: Gas Mask
gear.effect: This fighter is immune to "Gas" or "Toxic" weapon traits.

gear.name: Grapnel Line
gear.effect: Climb vertical surfaces up to 6” high without spending extra movement.

gear.name: Grav-chute
gear.effect: This fighter can move down any vertical distance for free without triggering a fall.

gear.name: Holy Icon
gear.effect: Friendly fighters within 6" add +1 to Bravery checks.

gear.name: Infantry Primer
gear.effect: This fighter ignores the first failed Bravery test of the game.

gear.name: Jump Pack
gear.effect: This fighter gains the Fly runemark and +2 Move.

gear.name: Magnoculars
gear.effect: Reveal a Stealthed enemy within 12". They lose Stealth and cannot regain it this round.

gear.name: Master-Crafted Kit
gear.effect: Once per game, re-roll a single failed hit roll with a specific weapon.

gear.name: Medi-pack
gear.effect: Choose a friendly fighter within 1". That fighter heals 1D3 Wounds.

gear.name: Medikit
gear.effect: Heal a friendly fighter within 1" for 1D6 Wounds.

gear.name: Neural Processor
gear.effect: Fighter may use abilities normally in Round 1. Gain +1 to X when using abilities to a max of 6.

gear.name: Photo Goggles
gear.effect: This fighter ignores the effects of Smoke or Darkness when checking Line of Sight.

gear.name: Power Armour
gear.effect: This fighter gains +3 Defence.

gear.name: Purity Seals
gear.effect: Immune to 'Fear' or 'Corruption' effects.

gear.name: Refractor Field
gear.effect: Until the end of the round, each time this fighter suffers damage, roll a dice; on a 5+, ignore that damage.

gear.name: Repair Kit
gear.effect: Target a fighter within 6 with the Cybernetic trait, remove X wounds from them.

gear.name: Servo-Skull
gear.effect: This fighter can attempt "Interact" actions from up to 3" away instead of 1".

gear.name: Shield
gear.effect: This fighter gains +1 Defence against Melee attacks.

gear.name: Shovel
gear.effect: Place a "Hasty Cover" marker. Provides Light Cover to one fighter.

gear.name: Silencer
gear.effect: An equipped Pistol gains the Silent trait.

gear.name: Smoke Canister
gear.effect: Create 3" smoke area within 6" (Blocks LoS). Once per game.

gear.name: Synthetic Grafting
gear.effect: The "one move action per turn" restriction is removed.

gear.name: The Emperor's Tarot
gear.effect: Roll dice equal to ability value. For each 4+, gain 1 Wild Dice.

gear.name: Vox bead
gear.effect: Ignore range for abilities if the target also has a Comlink.

gear.name: Vox-caster
gear.effect: Increases the range of the Leader's Command ability to 12".

gear.name: Vox Scrambler
gear.effect: Enemies within 6” cannot use communication abilities this round.

gear.name: Energy Shield
gear.effect: This model gains a 4+ Invulnerable Save (ignore damage on a 4+).

gear.name: Markerlight
gear.effect: Simple Action to paint targets. Friendly Fighters gain +1 Attack dice against this target.

gear.name: Auxiliary Grenade Launcher
gear.effect: Grenades fired by this Fighter have a range of 0-12.

gear.name: Storm Shield
gear.effect: This shield gives +1 Defence. Requires a hand to use.

gear.name: Cybernetic
gear.effect: This fighter has an parts of their anatomy replaced with cybernetics. They gain +1 def.

gear.name: Resurrection Orb
gear.effect: Once per battle, you may reroll failed Reanimation Protocols checks for all friendly Necrons within 6".

gear.name: Phase Shifter
gear.effect: This fighter gains a 4+ Invulnerable Save.

gear.name: Quantum Shielding
gear.effect: This fighter cannot be damaged by attacks with the 'Lethal' or 'Melta' traits.

gear.name: Chronometron
gear.effect: Target a friendly fighter within 6". Until the next round, attackers suffer -1 to hit that fighter.

weapon_traits.name: Agile
weapon_traits.effect: After this fighter makes an attack with this weapon, they may make a free Disengage action.

weapon_traits.name: Agonising
weapon_traits.effect: On a critical hit, halve the target’s Move characteristic (round up) until the end of its next activation.

weapon_traits.name: Arc
weapon_traits.effect: After resolving this attack, one other visible enemy within 3" of the target suffers damage equal to a hit damage.

weapon_traits.name: Beam
weapon_traits.effect: When selecting a target for this weapon, draw a straight line up to the weapons max range. All Fighers underneath that line (friend and foe) are a target for the attack. Make a single attack for all targets determining the damage individually.

weapon_traits.name: Melta
weapon_traits.effect: When performing an attack with this weapon against a target within half the weapon's maximum range, increase this weapon's Damage characteristic by +1/+1.

weapon_traits.name: Rad
weapon_traits.effect: After an attack with this weapon that does damage, the target suffers -1 Def until the end of the battle.

weapon_traits.name: Shock
weapon_traits.effect: After an attack with this weapon does damage, remove an action from the enemy fighter.

weapon_traits.name: Silent
weapon_traits.effect: Making this attack does not trigger reactions or abilities from enemy fighters.

weapon_traits.name: Supercharge
weapon_traits.effect: Choose to increase damage by +1/+1; if you miss, fighter takes damage equal to a crit.

weapon_traits.name: Warp
weapon_traits.effect: Ignore line of sight when selecting a target with this weapon.

weapon_traits.name: Pinning
weapon_traits.effect: Attacks with this weapon give a -1 M and -1 BS to the target fighter until the end of that the target fighters next activation.

fighter_traits.name: Assassin’s Mark
fighter_traits.effect: Mark a visible enemy within 6". While within 1" of a friendly with a Stealth token, that enemy has -1 Defence.

fighter_traits.name: Fade into Shadows
fighter_traits.effect: This fighter gains a Stealth token.

fighter_traits.name: Shadow Step
fighter_traits.effect: Choose a point within 6” that is not visible to any enemy. Teleport this fighter to that point.

fighter_traits.name: Silent Ambush
fighter_traits.effect: This fighter makes a bonus Move if they have a Stealth token and are not visible.

fighter_traits.name: Smoke Bomb
fighter_traits.effect: Friendly fighters within 6" gain a Stealth token if they are not currently visible to enemy fighters.

fighter_traits.name: Vanish
fighter_traits.effect: Remove fighter from board, set up 6"+ from enemies. Gain Stealth token.

fighter_traits.name: Reanimation Protocols
fighter_traits.effect: In the End Phase, if this fighter has been taken Out of Action but not removed from the campaign, roll a dice. On a 5+, they return to the board with 1 Wound remaining.

fighter_traits.name: Mandible Blasters
fighter_traits.effect: Pick a visible enemy fighter within 1" of this fighter and allocate 2 damage points to that fighter.

fighter_traits.name: The Holy Trinity
fighter_traits.effect: Bolter, Melta, and Flame weapons gain the Reliable trait (change a miss to a hit if there are no hits or crits).

fighter_traits.name: And They Shall Know No Fear
fighter_traits.effect: This fighter is immune to Psychology effects.

fighters.name: Intercessor
traits: And They Shall Know No Fear

fighters.name: Heavy Intercessor
traits: And They Shall Know No Fear

fighters.name: Intercessor Sergeant
traits: And They Shall Know No Fear
